name: Konstantin Grotov
title: Machine Learning Researcher
bio: I'm a Senior ML Researcher at JetBrains Research. My main focus is reinforcement learning for training software engineering agents. Before that, I worked on RLHF alignment for code generation models, AI agents for computational notebooks, and empirical software engineering.

I also have a background in theoretical and computational physics, where I worked on metamaterial design and nanophotonics. I'm passionate about photography, data visualization, and applying AI to physics.
